title: Changes in morphology and function of toe flexor muscles are related to training footwear
author: Wolfgang Potthast, Anja Niehoff, Bjoern Braunstein, Jan-Peter Goldmann, Kai Heinrich, Gert-Peter Brüggemann
conference: International Society of Biomechanics (ISB) - Footwear Biomechanics Group (FBG)
award: Basic Research Award by ISB-Footwear Biomechanics Group (FBG)
